creator: john@rwsrv05.mby.riverwillow.net.au
text:
www/en/docs/books.sgml,v 1.28 provides links to Articles and Books
within the FreeBSD Documentation.

	All links to books are to books/[bookname]/index.html (the html-split
version) rather than to books/[bookname]/book.html (the single-file version).

	Links to 44 of the 49 articles are to articles/[articlename]/index.html 
The following 5 are the exceptions:

/euro/article.html
/laptop/article.html
/linux-comparison/article.html
/mailing-list-faq/article.html
/relaydelay/article.html

How-To-Repeat: 	http://www.freebsd.org/docs/books.html and check the hyperlinks
to the above 5 articles.
